descent.comment: Linear impact impulse = max(minSpeed, incomingSpeed3d * velocityScale + downwardSpeed * downwardScale + mass * massScale).

rebound.comment: Fraction of linear impact impulse that becomes upward rebound velocity, and fraction of incoming horizontal velocity that carries the spray forward.

count.comment: Total droplets = clamp(minTotal, maxDropletsPerSpawn, floor(mass * massScale + impactImpulse / energyDivisor)).

dropletWidth.comment: Per-droplet base radius (cross-section) used for streak width and impact-jitter.

streak.comment: Long-axis length = width * (base + speed * speedScale) * groupLengthScale. Bigger = longer tails.

jet.comment: Tight near-vertical column at the impact point.

spray.comment: Mid-angle filler between jet and crown, forward-biased.

forwardBias.comment: Fraction of crown/spray droplets sampled within ±halfRangeDeg of the incoming heading. Remainder picks a fully random phi.
